findings.pattern_title: ECS Task RunTask + PassRole Privilege Chain

required_checks.description: Source principal has ecs:RegisterTaskDefinition AND ecs:RunTask
required_checks.name: source_has_ecs_create_and_run_permissions
required_checks.reason: both ecs:RegisterTaskDefinition and ecs:RunTask have explicit non-conditioned permission edges

required_checks.description: Source can PassRole to the target role
required_checks.name: source_has_passrole_to_target
required_checks.reason: explicit non-conditioned permission edge for iam:PassRole

required_checks.description: Target role's trust policy trusts ECS tasks
required_checks.name: target_trusts_ecs_tasks_service
required_checks.reason: target role arn:aws:iam::111111111111:role/AdminRole trusts ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com via trust edge b4dfed2296c02a5704bd85930de085dfbed8f256d46f27794353979a300158bd

required_checks.description: No SCP blocks ecs:RegisterTaskDefinition or ecs:RunTask with full confidence
required_checks.name: no_scp_blocks_ecs_create_or_run
required_checks.reason: RegisterTaskDefinition: 1 SCP binding(s) with governance_confidence ∈ partial/needs_review on ecs:RegisterTaskDefinition — cannot confirm; RunTask: no SCP bindings observed on ecs:RunTask witness edge

required_checks.description: No SCP blocks iam:PassRole with full confidence
required_checks.name: no_scp_blocks_passrole
required_checks.reason: no SCP bindings observed on iam:PassRole witness edge

required_checks.description: Permission boundary on source allows both ecs:RegisterTaskDefinition and ecs:RunTask
required_checks.name: no_boundary_blocks_ecs_create_or_run
required_checks.reason: RegisterTaskDefinition: no permission boundary bindings observed on ecs:RegisterTaskDefinition witness edge; RunTask: no permission boundary bindings observed on ecs:RunTask witness edge

required_checks.description: Permission boundary on source allows iam:PassRole
required_checks.name: no_boundary_blocks_passrole
required_checks.reason: no permission boundary bindings observed on iam:PassRole witness edge

required_checks.description: iam:PassRole condition iam:PassedToService is absent or scoped to ECS tasks
required_checks.name: passrole_condition_scoped_to_ecs_or_absent
required_checks.reason: no condition block on PassRole statement (unrestricted)

findings.title: Inconclusive ECS PassRole chain from arn:aws:iam::111111111111:user/Alice to arn:aws:iam::111111111111:role/AdminRole
